shortcuts_overview.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts_overview.content:
Pipeflow is designed for quick keyboard access. Learn these shortcuts and you'll move through your patch much faster.

Most high-frequency controls stay close to your left hand so you can keep routing without hunting through menus.
shortcuts_overview.tip: Press H anytime to see the full shortcut reference.

panel_shortcuts.title: Panels & Navigation
panel_shortcuts.content:
Open the surfaces you use most:

• H - Help
• I - Inspector
• , - Settings
• [ - Toggle left navigation
• ] - Toggle right sidebar

Use the left navigation to move between Patch, Auto Connect, and Saved Setups.
panel_shortcuts.tip: If the layout feels crowded, hide a sidebar and bring it back when you need it.

view_shortcuts.title: View Shortcuts
view_shortcuts.content:
Navigate and organize:

• +/= - Zoom in
• - - Zoom out
• Ctrl+0 - Fit all
• Ctrl+L or Ctrl+Shift+R - Organize patch
view_shortcuts.tip: Mouse scroll wheel also zooms in and out!

safety_shortcuts.title: Safety Shortcuts
safety_shortcuts.content:
Stay safe:

• Space or F9 - PANIC! Mute everything

Safety mode switches live in the toolbar and command palette so the current protection state stays visible.
safety_shortcuts.tip: The panic shortcut is designed to be easy to hit in an emergency.

selection_shortcuts.title: Selection Shortcuts
selection_shortcuts.content:
Select nodes efficiently:

• Ctrl+A - Select all visible nodes
• Escape - Deselect all
• Delete - Remove selected links

Combine with mouse:
• Shift+Click - Add to selection
• Ctrl+Click - Toggle selection
selection_shortcuts.tip: Box select by clicking and dragging on empty space.

command_palette.title: Command Palette
command_palette.content:
The ultimate power tool:

• Ctrl+K or Ctrl+P - Open command palette
• / - Quick open command search

Type to fuzzy-search through all commands. Arrow keys to navigate, Enter to execute.

Every action in Pipeflow is available here!
command_palette.tip: Forgot where something moved? Open the command palette and search with either the new or old name.
